title: orobus tricuspidata
intro: Orobus tricuspidata, also known as the kidney vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat kidney stones and urinary tract issues due to its high concentration of oxalate-degrading compounds. The health benefits of Orobus tricuspidata include its potential to reduce oxalate levels in the body, alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support kidney health and prevent the formation of kidney stones.
